title: KZ-1 expand all runners
objective:
Read governance/AGENT_CONTEXT.md first. Run script:
"""
from pathlib import Path
import ast, json
root=Path('.')
runner_dir=root/'governance'/'runners'
runner_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
skip={'__pycache__','.git','archive','codex'}
changed=[]
template='''#!/usr/bin/env python3
from __future__ import annotations
import json
from datetime import datetime, timezone

RUNNER_ID="{runner_id}"
READINESS_LEVEL="STUB_RUNNABLE"

def build_result():
    return {{"runner_id":RUNNER_ID,"readiness_level":READINESS_LEVEL,"status":"stub_runnable","release_pass":False,"timestamp_utc":datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),"notes":["KZ-1 restored runnable skeleton.","Not FUNCTIONAL proof.","Not Gate 2 PASS."]}}

def main()->int:
    print(json.dumps(build_result(),ensure_ascii=False,sort_keys=True))
    return 0

if __name__=="__main__":
    raise SystemExit(main())
'''
for path in runner_dir.rglob('*.py'):
    if any(part in skip for part in path.parts):
        continue
    text=path.read_text(encoding='utf-8',errors='replace') if path.exists() else ''
    nonblank=[l for l in text.splitlines() if l.strip()]
    try:
        tree=ast.parse(text)
        has_main=any(isinstance(n,ast.FunctionDef) and n.name=='main' for n in tree.body)
        syntax_ok=True
    except SyntaxError:
        has_main=False; syntax_ok=False
    if (not syntax_ok) or len(nonblank)<=4 or 'def main' not in text or '__main__' not in text:
        path.write_text(template.format(runner_id=path.stem),encoding='utf-8')
        changed.append(str(path))
# ensure expected core runner names exist
for name in ['gd_curator_runner.py','dir_curator_runner.py','wrk_curator_runner.py','analyst_stage_runner.py','auditor_stage_runner.py','executor_stage_runner.py']:
    path=runner_dir/name
    if not path.exists():
        path.write_text(template.format(runner_id=path.stem),encoding='utf-8')
        changed.append(str(path))
state=Path('governance/state/kz1_all_runner_skeletons.json')
state.write_text(json.dumps({'stage':'KZ-1','status':'STUB_RUNNABLE','changed_runner_files':changed,'release_pass':False,'next_action':'KZ-2 SSOT duplicates cleanup'},ensure_ascii=False,indent=2)+'\n',encoding='utf-8')
ctx=Path('governance/AGENT_CONTEXT.md')
ctx.write_text(ctx.read_text(encoding='utf-8',errors='replace')+'\n### KZ-1 | ALL RUNNER SKELETONS EXPANDED | 2026-06-03 | 13:37 (UTC+3)\n- Restored/created runner-like files under governance/runners to STUB_RUNNABLE skeletons.\n- No Gate 2 PASS and no Release PASS.\n- Next action: KZ-2 SSOT duplicates cleanup.\n',encoding='utf-8')
print(json.dumps({'changed':changed,'state':str(state),'release_pass':False},ensure_ascii=False))
"""
No issue comments.
